channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Higher Social Security payments coming for millions of people from bill that Biden is signing
item.description: President Joe Biden is set to sign into law a measure that boosts Social Security payments for current and former public employees.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No Jan. 6 disruptions are expected as Trump's win boosts Republicans' faith in elections -- for now
item.description: Four years ago, then-President Donald Trump rallied his supporters to march to the U.S. Capitol and urged his vice president to stop the congressional certification of Democrat Joe Biden's victory.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Riccardi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Driving into Manhattan? That'll cost you, as new congestion toll starts Sunday
item.description: New York’s new toll for drivers entering the center of Manhattan is starting up after it withstood years of political wrangling, a last-minute pause and a flurry of legal challenges.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jimmy Carter's funeral services begin with trek to childhood home, Atlanta
item.description: Former President Jimmy Carter's week-long state funeral services began Saturday morning with a trek to his childhood home and the Carter Presidential Center.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jill Biden gets the priciest gift from a foreign leader in 2023
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden and his family were given tens of thousands of dollars in gifts from foreign leaders in 2023, according to an annual accounting published by the State Department on Thursday, with first lady Jill Biden receiving the single most expensive present: a $20,000 diamo
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Congress is notified by the Biden administration of a planned $8 billion weapons sale to Israel
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The State Department has informed Congress of a planned $8 billion weapons sale to Israel, U.S. officials say, as the American ally presses forward with its war against Hamas in Gaza. Some of the arms in the package could be sent through current U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A user’s manual to certifying the presidential election
item.description: After Mike Johnson wins reelection The House and Senate will meet on Monday in a Joint Session of Congress to certify the results of the 2024 presidential vote.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lombardo's State of the State speech set for Jan. 15
item.description: Gov. Joe Lombardo will give his 2025 State of the State Address on Wednesday, Jan. 15, at 6 p.m., according to a Friday statement from the governor's office.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden awards the Medal of Honor and Medal of Valor to military heroes and first responders
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — On Feb. 15, 1951, Army Pvt. Bruno R. Orig was returning from a mission when he found his fellow soldiers under attack in what's now known as the Battle of Chipyong-ni.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Excerpts from the judge's ruling to go ahead with Trump sentencing
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The judge overseeing Donald Trump's hush money case in New York dealt with a host of weighty, unprecedented questions before deciding Friday that the president-elect should be sentenced later this month for the crime of falsifying business records.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Capitol Hill's newest faces ready for bipartisan collaboration
item.description: Dozens of new lawmakers were sworn in, and Mike Johnson retained his position as House speaker Friday as Congress convened.
item.dc:creator: Joe Khalil, NewsNation

item.title: With Board Chair Nora Vargas ending her term, here's who's vying to replace her
item.description: As of Friday, there are four people who have shown interest in running to replace Chair Nora Vargas on the San Diego County Board of Supervisors at the end of her term.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: New Majority Leader Thune kicks off Senate session with pledge to preserve filibuster
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — New Senate Majority Leader John Thune is kicking off the new session with a promise to preserve the filibuster, saying in his first floor speech as leader that his priority will be to “ensure the Senate stays the Senate.” Thune, R-S.D.
item.dc:creator: MARY CLARE JALONICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Johnson battles for the Speakership: 5 things to watch
item.description: Friday’s Speaker vote is shaping up to be a nail-biter as Rep. Mike Johnson (R-La.), the current House leader, is scrambling to keep the gavel for the next two years in the face of conservative critics furious with his leadership style.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Whip list: Lawmakers to watch in Friday’s Speaker vote
item.description: About a dozen lawmakers remain major question marks in Speaker Mike Johnson's (R-La.) quest to win a floor vote for the gavel Friday.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Trump to hold DC rally day before inauguration
item.description: The president-elect has not held a rally in the District of Columbia since he delivered a speech on the Ellipse on Jan. 6, 2021, which preceded a violent attack on the Capitol by supporters attempting to stop the certification of the 2020 election results.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Sanders gets Finance perch to push Social Security, Medicare expansion, tax reform
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.), who supports expanding Social Security and Medicare and raising taxes on the wealthy, will get a seat on the Senate’s powerful Finance Committee, which has jurisdiction over those big issues.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Progressives face an existential crisis under Trump
item.description: Progressives in Washington are facing an existential crisis like never before as they brace for the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, NewsNation

item.title: The top 5 education issues of 2024
item.description: Universities and state education policies dominated in 2024 with a tumultuous year that saw massive protests over the Israel-Hamas war and lawsuits over the separation of church and state in public schools.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: 7 rising Democratic leaders to watch
item.description: Democrats are scrambling for a new leader to head the party and organize resistance to President-elect Trump following Vice President Harris’s loss in November's election.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, Fox 5

item.title: Trump gives complete and total endorsement of Johnson as Speaker
item.description: President-elect Trump offered his complete and total endorsement of Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Monday, days before a House vote on Friday to elect a new Speaker. "Speaker Mike Johnson is a good, hard working, religious man. He will do the right thing, and we will continue to WIN.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WFLA, NBC
